prompt:
Subject: A pink sailor girl miniature trapped in a transparent capsule / capsule miniature

Characters/Expressions: Q-version girl with large eyes, soft brown long hair, bangs, flower hair accessories, soft blush, a bright innocent smile, making a cute peace sign.

Clothing/Pose: pale pink sailor-style school uniform, large white and pink bow, slightly short pleated skirt, white socks and pink shoes, a small shoulder bag, light pose with one leg slightly raised.

Background/Light: A small Japanese-style alley space inside a transparent capsule, cobblestone paths, rows of wooden houses, Japanese lanterns, a lovely garden with cherry blossoms and small flowers, background is warm beige bokeh, gentle enveloping natural light.

Composition/Camera: Macro photography, vertical composition, entire capsule placed in the center, composition held by hand, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on the figure's face, background heavily and softly blurred.

Texture/Style: High-definition, 4K quality, ultra-exquisite miniature diorama expression, natural reflections on transparent plastic, soft white well-groomed female hands, pale pink nails, delicate and cute Q-version figure, sweet and dreamy color tones, warm toy photo style, Japanese-style miniature art emphasizing cuteness.

Negative: low quality, unnatural face, unnatural hands, extra fingers, missing fingers, distorted fingers, broken eyes, asymmetrical face, failed skirt, cloudy capsule, excessive reflections, messy background, duplicate items, text, logo, watermark
